description: Validation matrix F10 · Hardware+software hybrid post-Kickstarter. Expected: activation+retention emphasis, low-MRR but post-product.

mocked_enrichment.company_context: Smart-home sensor with companion iOS/Android app. $199 hardware + $5/mo optional cloud storage. Post-Kickstarter, 4,200 hardware units sold, 1,100 on monthly sub = $5.5k MRR. Hardware revenue separate.
